raw_consumer_statement:
Reference Number : XXXX I submitted a dispute with Amex that XXXX didnt receive the merchandise. 
The merchant provided a photo of the return, which showed that they did not receive the bracelet. Therefore, the merchant concluded that I took the bracelet. 
Then the merchant provided the receipt of my purchase and XXXX 's signature. Ironically, the signatory is not me, and this person signed with an illegal ID. 
The merchant was sure that I didn't return the goods, because I didn't receive the goods at all. 
In the week when the incident happened, the merchant contacted me and said that he had not received the goods. And the merchant mentioned that they had filed a claim with XXXX  and I also provided the police reports. 
In the face of so much evidence I provided, Amex still rejected my dispute. 
Sum up, package was signed by an invalid XXXX is not responsible for this purchase.

And the merchant doesnt have evidence that XXXX XXXX the package and have the merchandise in XXXX XXXX. 
Please ask for certificate of receipt signed by the Cardholder from the merchant. XXXX indicates that the merchant has an image that shows who signed for it. The merchant has not provided this document. Please ask the merchant to provide this document!! 
I won't pay this bill. I will fight until the end.
